issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1214: remaining Python asset sweep 4/10

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: Repeated non-fast-forward races on origin/main blocked a clean main push while parallel unattended lanes were updating the shared .symphony/workpad.md file.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1214 changes.
Lane commit details are recorded in git history and summarized in the validation report.
